title: 2026 Oscar Best Picture Predictions & Analysis
text: According to IndieWire's predictions, the Best Picture contenders in order of likelihood to win are: One Battle After Another as frontrunner, Sinners, Hamnet, Sentimental Value, Marty Supreme, Frankenstein, The Secret Agent, Train Dreams, Bugonia, and F1. Awards Editor Marcus Jones emphasizes that this year's race feels unusually competitive. He notes that while One Battle After Another dominates the technical categories, the margins between contenders remain razor-thin. Jones describes the dynamic as unpredictable: Yes, One Battle After Another is about as dominant a contender as a film can be, and yet these margins all feel razor thin. Rather than a steamroller victory, the 2026 race features multiple films winning in different spheres. Sinners has performed exceptionally well in acting categories and original screenplay, while One Battle After Another leads in adapted screenplay, cinematography, and editing. This distribution suggests the ceremony could deliver surprising results across the evening. The 98th Academy Awards ceremony airs March 15, 2026, on ABC.
